# Senior Placement Helpline

> Free, expert assisted living placement service connecting families with the right senior care facility nationwide.

## About
Senior Placement Helpline is a free service that matches families with assisted living facilities (ALFs) across all 50 states. Our placement specialists guide families through the process at no cost.

## Services
- Assisted living placement (all 50 states)
- Memory care facility matching
- Senior care consultation
- Personalized facility recommendations

## Contact
- Phone: 866-ALF-FIND (866-253-3463)
- Web: https://seniorplacementhelpline.com

## How It Works
1. Call or complete our form
2. Speak with a placement specialist
3. Get matched to the right facility

## Keywords
senior placement, assisted living, ALF, memory care, senior care, free placement service
